{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "pahrkahpis/ ko es teem eſmu pa-
wehlejis/ tee arrirr nota Jsdelde-
tina rehmufschi/ un irr ſaggutchi/
un arridsan aisleeufschi/ un irr
to ſtarp ſaweem Rihkeem liku-
fchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ne warr Israëta
Behrni preekſch ſaweein Eenaid-
neefeem pastahweht/ teem buhs
behdsin behgt preekſch ſaweem Ee-
naidneefeem/ jo tee irr Jsdeldeſti-
xt/ Es ne buhſchu wairs ar jums/
ja juhs ne to/ kas Jsdeldeſtins/no
fawa Widdus iſnihzinajat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zellees/ ſwehti tohs Lau-
dis/ un ſakki: Swehtijeteecs us
Rihta Deenu/ jo ta ſakka tas
KUNGS tas Israëta Deewß;
Weena isdeldeſtina Leeta irr ſtarp
tew Israëts/ tu ne warrt pastah-
weht preekſch ſaweeim Eenaidnee-
feem/ teekains tu to/ kas Jsdelde-
tins no tawa Widdus atremſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jums tad buhs Rihta a-
gri nahkt preekſcha pehz jubtahm
Ziltim/ un ta Zilts/ fo tas KUNGS
usrahdihs/ lai nahk preekſcha pehz
ſaweem Raddeem/ un tas Rads/
to tas KUNGS usrahdihs/ lai
nahk preekſcha pehz ſawahm Sai-
meim/ un ta Saime/ fo tas
KUNGS usrahdihs/ lai nahk
preekſcha pehz ſaweem Sainnee-
feem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas ar to Jsdeldeſtins
atraſts taps/ tam buhs ar Uggu-
ni ſadedſinatam tapt/lihdsar wiſ-
fu/ kas tam peeder/ tapehz ka
wiſsch ta KUNGA Derribn irr
pahrkahpis/ un tapehz ka wiſsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Josuiis Ri-
ta agri/ un peevede Israëlu pe-
ſawahm Ziltim/tad tappe ta Ju-
da Zilts uſrahdita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiſsch to Juhda Z-
ti peevede/tad tappe uſrahdihs
to Seräiteru Rads/ un kad ta
Seräiteru Rads peeveſte tapp-
pehz teem Saimneefeem/tad ta-
pe Sabdus uſrahdihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka Saime/ kad ta peeve-
ſta tappe pehz teemSaimneefeem
tad tappe Akans uſrahdihts
Karmus Dehls/ ta Dehla Sa-
dus/ ta Dehla Serus/ no ta-
Juhda Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ſazzija Josuiis us Q-
kann: Mans Dehls/dohd jelle ta-
KUNGAM tam Israëta De-
wain to Gohdu/ un dohd winna-
to Slawu/ un ſtahsti jelle man-
ko tu effi darriijs/ un ne patlep-
to preekſch mannim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Akans Jo-
sün/ un ſazzija: Teetcham es e-
mu apgrehtojees prett to KUN-
GU to Israëta Deewu/ un efin-
ta un ta darriijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es eeraudsiju ſtarp
taupijumu weenu dahrgu Bab-
loneru Mehteli/ un diwideſmit-
Sudraba Sihtetus/ un ween-
Selta Mehli/kaSwars bija pee-
desmits Sihteti/ un es eeſahroj-
tahs Leetas un rehmu tahs/ u-
rangi tahs irr patlehptas eeſt-
Seimes/ mannā Telti/ un ta-
Sudrabs tur appaſſcha.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
